subject.title: On v5 I get a warning when using tools and experimental_output with sonnet models
subject.body:
### Description

As the title says, I get this warning when using `tools` and `experimental_output` with sonnet 4.5 models, that says:
```
AI SDK Warning: The "tools" setting is not supported by this model - JSON response format does not support tools. The provided tools are ignored.
```

The combination works fine on v4 though with the same model. Here's a reproduction repo https://github.com/cristianbote/ai-sdk-4-vs-5-claude-tools

### AI SDK Version

- ai: 4.3.16
- @ai-sdk/anthropic@1.2.12

- ai: 5.0.95
- @ai-sdk/anthropic: 2.0.45

### Code of Conduct

- [x] I agree to follow this project's Code of Conduct
